query:
SELECT id, cliente, tipo, costo_por_unidad 
FROM anuncios 
WHERE id BETWEEN 210000 AND 210100 
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4MNpKPTYaa3AiSj.root --database NB4DzLv3DwSWij5HcQ7rQi --execute SELECT id, cliente, tipo, costo_por_unidad 
FROM anuncios 
WHERE id BETWEEN 210000 AND 210100 
LIMIT 5;
